title: MinePanel
description: A Webserver that lets admins control and manage the Minecraft Server.
body:
# MinePanel

An admin management tool Minecraft with a variety of features.

⚠️ **NOTE** This Plugin is still in early development and security and performance issues can and will appear. Do **not** use in Production unless you know what you are doing

⚠️ **Design** The design is temporary and will be changed for release. (I used ai to make the design for now)

ℹ️ **Full Wiki** can be found [here](https://git.winniepat.de/winnie/MinePanel/wiki)
## Features

- Live Console View
- Logging
- Plugin List
- Player Management (Kicking, Temp Banning, Permanent Banning)
- User Management with different permissions on the panel

## Extensions

### I am thinking about a new solution for downloading...

## Important Notes

When first launching the server with the plugin installed, a String of text will be printed into the Server console that you will need to paste in the setup to create an owner user for the panel (Bootstrap Token):
![setup_token](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/540e1480a350be26053756b0d4db6578597399a0.png)

You need to open a port on the server. This is port `8080` by default.
Without opening this port, the panel can't be reached.
This port can be changed in the server config.
